cross_references.contradiction_message: ROW-9957: 'I'll screenshot this and file for full custody' | ROW-9960: 'Call me crazy if you want to but that is what will happen'
cross_references.notes: Clearest Level A pair in dataset. Threat issued and denied within the same message cluster. No forward search required — both messages in B-027 ROW range. RF-05 S020 (DARVO-denial mechanism) documents same event from RF-05 perspective.

unresolved_claims.anchor_message: I've told her to have conversations and I also give her things to tell you about. I remind her of some of the things she's told me so that she will share
unresolved_claims.watch_for: Any 'I never told Olivia what to say' or 'I don't coach her' language in B-019 through B-031
unresolved_claims.result: No coaching denial found in B-019 through B-031. ROW-6819 stands undenied at dataset close.
unresolved_claims.notes: ADD-002 forward anchor. Eli's CP2 observation: Melissa's comfort with the admission suggests coaching is normalized and habitual across all subjects. Absence of denial is consistent with this interpretation — no need to walk it back. Note for Phase 2 synthesis: ROW-6819 as undenied coaching admission is significant; the absence of subsequent denial is itself a behavioral data point.
